violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate. Current ServSafe holder only has a "Handler" certificate.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager is no longer associated with this establishment.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Observed kitchen employee not wash hands after coming from outside facility.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. -Plumbing is not connected to kitchen handwash sink.
